description_long: This is a rustic wooden bench constructed from several wide, dark-stained planks forming a flat seating surface. The bench is supported by two robust, solid end legs, each with a distinctive cut-out at the base, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The wood shows visible grain and some irregularities, suggesting it is either reclaimed or intentionally weathered for an aged look. There are no backrests or armrests, making the bench simple and utilitarian, suitable for communal or public use. The overall design is low to the ground and broad, providing ample seating space. Its construction and finish suggest it is intended for outdoor environments such as parks, gardens, or urban plazas.
description: A wide, dark wooden bench with a flat plank seat and two solid, cut-out end supports, featuring a rustic, weathered finish and no backrest or armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat seat and the two sturdy end legs with cut-out bases.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the solid, rectangular profile of the end support.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flat seat and the symmetrical end supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plank thickness and the cut-out detail in the end support.
attribute_leg_design: two wide wooden end supports with cut-out bases
